---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description or user story

Please describe the bug, or just tell the story of what happened when something
went wrong.

Include steps to reproduce the bug if you think that’s helpful.

## Expected behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

Include screenshots if relevant.

## Visual display issue

If something isn’t displaying properly, please say what device (smartphone,
laptop, etc.) and browser (Safari, Chrome, Firefox) you noticed this on.

## Context

Any other context?
